docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED SEP-05-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MONTANA, RYAN
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/8/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-26-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-09-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANDREA BALDO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RYAN MONTANA IS PRESENT. PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN THE SRL MEDIATION PROGRAM AND REACHED AN AGREEMENT. PURSUANT TO THE SIGNED MEDIATION AGREEMENT IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE APRIL 14, 2017 HEARING THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. PLAINTIFF ANDREA BALDO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RYAN MONTANA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,700.00 FILED BY BALDO, ANDREA AS TO DEFENDANT MONTANA, RYAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO RYAN MONTANA ON 11/09/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BALDO, ANDREA
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES. CASE SETTLED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
